name: pelican
title: Pelican Panel + Wings
description: Open-source game server management panel with a companion Wings daemon. Supports SQLite (default) or MySQL. After deploy, configure Wings via the template editor config.yml with your panel token from the Wings node setup page.

variables.name: PANEL_PORT_HTTP
variables.label: Panel HTTP Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Pelican Panel web interface (HTTP)

variables.name: PANEL_PORT_HTTPS
variables.label: Panel HTTPS Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Pelican Panel web interface (HTTPS)

variables.name: PANEL_APP_URL
variables.label: Panel URL
variables.description: Public URL of the Pelican Panel (e.g. https://pelican.example.com)

variables.name: PANEL_ADMIN_EMAIL
variables.label: Admin Email
variables.description: Administrator email address (used for Let's Encrypt and panel identity)

variables.name: PANEL_TRUSTED_PROXIES
variables.label: Trusted Proxies
variables.description: Trusted proxy IPs for HTTPS (use * when behind Traefik/nginx)

variables.name: PANEL_DB_CONNECTION
variables.label: Database Type
variables.description: Database backend: sqlite (default, zero config) or mysql (requires external MySQL)

variables.name: PANEL_DB_HOST
variables.label: MySQL Host
variables.description: MySQL server hostname (only used when Database Type is mysql)

variables.name: PANEL_DB_PORT
variables.label: MySQL Port
variables.description: MySQL server port (only used when Database Type is mysql)

variables.name: PANEL_DB_NAME
variables.label: MySQL Database Name
variables.description: MySQL database name (only used when Database Type is mysql)

variables.name: PANEL_DB_USER
variables.label: MySQL Username
variables.description: MySQL username (only used when Database Type is mysql)

variables.name: PANEL_DB_PASSWORD
variables.label: MySQL Password
variables.description: MySQL password (only used when Database Type is mysql)

variables.name: WINGS_SFTP_PORT
variables.label: Wings SFTP Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for Wings SFTP file access

variables.name: WINGS_PORT
variables.label: Wings Management Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for Wings daemon management API

variables.name: WINGS_UID
variables.label: Wings User ID
variables.description: System user ID for the Wings process (match your host pelican-wings user)

variables.name: WINGS_GID
variables.label: Wings Group ID
variables.description: System group ID for the Wings process

variables.name: WINGS_USERNAME
variables.label: Wings Username
variables.description: System username for the Wings process

variables.name: PELICAN_SERVER_DIR
variables.label: Server Files Directory
variables.description: Host path where game server files are stored (must be an absolute path)
